ford_ka_job_note_6e3e8235c1.text: Early first-generation Ka uses the legacy Ford key family. Remote style varies, so verify the original key before supply.

ford_ka_job_note_910bbb5349.text: Early first-generation Ka uses the legacy Ford key family. Remote style varies, so verify the original key before supply. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_ka_job_note_f391abbdc8.text: Later first-generation Ka changes to 4D60 while retaining the FO21 blade family.

ford_ka_job_note_9a9baa2ac5.text: Later first-generation Ka changes to 4D60 while retaining the FO21 blade family. Some key hardware varies within this year/build range. Confirm the original key, VIN and physical vehicle configuration before supply.

ford_ka_job_note_8297fc315c.text: This generation shares the Fiat 500 platform. KeyStation lists compatible Ford/Fiat 433 MHz ID46 PCF7946 SIP22 remotes, including OEM reference 71765697 on the 3-button family. Never select the Ford PATS menu solely because the badge is Ford.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
